headline: Chrome MV3 extension that overlays an annotation/anatomy HUD on any page; Alt+click labels elements, popup toggles/exports/clears, side-panel hover lights regions.

capabilities.evidence: popup.js:13 refresh() -> send('status'); content.js:2682 reply({ on, count, scope })
popup.js:20 toggle click -> send('toggle'); content.js:2681 setOn(!state.on)

capabilities.invoke: Alt+click any page element to label it
capabilities.evidence: content.js:181 onClick if(!e.altKey) return; content.js:186 promptLabel(e.target, ...)

capabilities.invoke: Hover a label/dot in the side panel to light its region
capabilities.evidence: content.js:809 mouseenter -> lightN(c.dataset.n); content.js:152 dot mouseenter -> showTooltip
content.js:865 numbersBtn click toggle no-numbers; content.js:872 labelsBtn; content.js:878 linesBtn -> drawLeaderLines()
popup.js:24 export click -> send('export'); content.js:2683 doExport()

capabilities.invoke: Click clear page in popup (confirm-gated wipe of all labels for scope)
capabilities.evidence: popup.js:27 clear click -> confirm() then send('clear'); content.js:2684 state.labels[scopeKey()]=[]; save()
